violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the back food preparation area was blocked by a speed rack. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The speed rack was moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in front service area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue working with pest control to determine action plan. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Pastries within the front display case were observed to have small flies landing on select food items during the time of inspection. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk-in cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the large ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The drainage pipe for the small ice machine next to oven in back prep area is lacking a properly designed air gap. Air gaps must be adjusted to prevent back siphonage of water in an event of negative pressure within water supply system. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
